history.text: Latvia declared independence or statehood, marking a decisive political break.
Constitution adopted and became an important marker in Latvia's constitutional development.
Latvia restored its statehood after a period of outside rule or union.

worthSeeing.title: Riga Art Nouveau:
worthSeeing.text: One-third of Riga's buildings are Art Nouveau — the highest concentration in the world.

worthSeeing.title: Gauja National Park:
worthSeeing.text: Sandstone cliffs, medieval castles and forest trails in Latvia's oldest park.

worthSeeing.title: Jurmala:
worthSeeing.text: A 33 km beach resort of wooden villas and spas on the Gulf of Riga.
